user.title: Configure HA RAGent
user.description: Choose which vector database, embedding and LLM backends to use for this integration, then provide connection details (host, port, SSL) for the model APIs.

data_description.rag_vector_db_backend: Choose which vector database backend to use
data_description.rag_embedding_backend: Choose which embedding backend to use
data_description.rag_llm_backend: Choose which LLM backend to use
data_description.rag_vector_db_username: Optional username for the vector database
data_description.rag_vector_db_password: Optional password for the vector database
data_description.rag_vector_db_name: Name of the vector database to use
data_description.rag_vector_db_host: Hostname or IP for the vector database
data_description.rag_embedding_model: Model to use with the embedding backend
data_description.rag_embedding_host: Hostname or IP for embedding API
data_description.rag_llm_model: Model to use with the LLM backend
data_description.rag_llm_host: Hostname or IP for LLM API

error.invalid_hostname: The provided hostname was invalid. Please ensure you only provide the domain or IP address and not the full API endpoint.
error.failed_to_connect: Failed to connect to the remote API: {exception}

pick_model.title: Pick Models
pick_model.description: Select the embedding and LLM models to use for this AI RAGent.

model_parameters.title: Configure Model Parameters
model_parameters.description: Configure the model parameters and behavior for the AI RAGent.

data_description.rag_prompt: The system prompt that defines the behavior and personality of the assistant
data_description.rag_enable_model_thinking: Disables thinking of the model in order to speed up response times.
data_description.rag_temperature: Sampling temperature; higher = more random, lower = more deterministic
data_description.rag_max_tokens: Maximum number of tokens the model may generate per response
data_description.rag_context_length: How many past messages to include in the model context window
data_description.rag_max_tool_call_iterations: Limit on how many times the agent may call external tools per request
data_description.rag_llm_hass_api: Select a Home Assistant LLM API provider

error.sys_refresh_caching_enabled: System prompt refresh must be enabled for prompt caching to work
error.missing_icl_file: The in context learning example file was not found: {filename}

init.title: HA RAGent Options
init.description: Update connection details for the APIs hosting the models.

data_description.rag_vector_db_username: Optional username for the vector database
data_description.rag_vector_db_password: Optional password for the vector database
data_description.rag_vector_db_name: Name of the vector database to use
data_description.rag_vector_db_host: Hostname or IP for the vector database
data_description.rag_embedding_host: Hostname or IP for embedding API
data_description.rag_llm_host: Hostname or IP for LLM API

error.failed_to_connect: Failed to connect to the remote API: {exception}
error.invalid_hostname: The provided hostname was invalid. Please ensure you only provide the domain or IP address and not the full API endpoint.

preload_models.name: Preload Models
preload_models.description: Preloads models for a specific integration instance.

unload_models.name: Unload Models
unload_models.description: Unloads models to free up resources for a specific integration instance.
